Title: Sub: Company schema and config alignment
Description:
**Scope:** Align company table and data layer with docs/ROSTER_DATA_MODEL.md and config.

**Snake_case columns:**
- short_name, state, company_name, company_website, job_site, batch_id, company_data, agent_responses (no camelCase)

**Two blobs:**
- company_data: notes keyed by prompt index (e.g. prefilter_company_notes); parse_instructions when applicable
- agent_responses: array of { timestamp, prompt_index, raw_response }

**State validation:**
- Validate state against ASTRAL_CONFIG["company_states"] only
- No hardcoded ALLOWED_STATES (ASTRAL_CODE_RULES 2b)

**batch_id:**
- On company table; same locking concept as posting

**Note:**
- Company table is used only in the new codebase; old codebase used _roster.json

**Checklist:**
- Use config for allowed states
- No magic numbers
- No hardcoded sets

**Ref:** README State machines, config.py company_states

Title: Sub: find_job_page orchestration

2. Enumerate

4. Extract content
5. vet_job_site
6. Route by response_type

**Config task keys:**
- find_job_site
- vet_job_site
- Single-layer; roster.py decides context

**Limits:**
- Recursion limit from config or named constant
- visited_urls tracking
- max_depth

**Status:** Built (legacy); apply course corrections (stop at TO_PARSE, UPPERCASE state)
